summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Fast Forever
film.announcement: Vin Diesel has begun production on Fast Forever, teasing it as the most amazing finale for the franchise.

film.title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
film.announcement: A promotional featurette introduces Joseph Zada in the role of young Haymitch Abernathy.

tv.title: Untitled Larry David HBO Show
tv.talent: Rob Reiner as George Washington, Larry David
tv.announcement: Rob Reiner makes a secret final appearance as George Washington in Larry David's HBO show.
